title: Replace the principal photo on the Home page

requirements.text: Replace the existing principal photo used on the Home page with the user’s newly uploaded principal image, ensuring the final asset is a clean, sharp, perfectly square (1:1) 600×600 PNG, centered on the face horizontally with slight natural headroom, framed head-and-shoulders and cropped slightly above the elbows, and saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png.

quotes: I would like to change the image of the principal that I uploaded already

acceptanceCriteria: A new principal image is processed to a 600×600 square crop (face centered, slight headroom, head-and-shoulders framing, cropped slightly above the elbows).
The processed image is saved/updated at frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png.
The Home page continues to display the principal photo correctly using the same path (/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png) with no layout regressions in the Welcome/Principal section.

constraints: Do not change other Home page sections or global styling; only update the principal photo asset and any minimal references required to keep it displaying correctly.
Do not route the principal photo through the backend; keep it as a static frontend asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other frontend immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Creating new admin-panel functionality for uploading/changing the principal image (this request is limited to replacing the already-uploaded principal image asset).
Changing the principal name/title/message text or the Faculty/Staff image/content.

edits: Replace the principal portrait with the new uploaded image and re-export as a clean square 600×600 PNG (principal-photo.dim_600x600.png > principal-photo.dim_600x600.png)
